title: Sri Navaladi Karuppannaswami Temple – Mohanur
tagline: Sri Navaladi Karuppannaswami Temple – Mohanur — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Sri Navaladi Karuppannaswami Temple – Mohanur, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Arulmigu Navaladi Karuppannaswami Temple – Mohanur is a 500-1000 year-old temple in Mohanur, Namakkal District, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Arulmigu Navaladi Karuppannaswami Temple – Mohanur is a 500-1000 year-old temple in Mohanur, Namakkal District, Tamil Nadu, India. Its presiding deity is Karuppu Sami, also known as Navaladian and Judge Durai and known as Pattamarathan. Its reputation is Swayambu known for two trees, the "Holy tree" known as Naval tree and the "Special tree", known as Neem Tree.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Asaladeebesvarar Temple, Mohanur
topPlaces.description: Asaladeebesvarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Mohanur in Namakkal district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Mohanur
topPlaces.description: Mohanur is a municipality and subdistrict in the Mohanur block of Namakkal district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Manappalli
topPlaces.description: Manapalli is a small village on the northern bank of the Cauvery River in the Namakkal district of Tamil Nadu, India. Over 5000 people live in this village, which includes Manapalli, GanapathiPalayam, Rasagounden Pudur, Ramanaicken Palyam, Ellaikattuputhur, Kunnipalayam, Theerthampalayam, Aruvankattur, Ganeshapuram, Chennakkal Pudur (bordering the Mohanur sugar factory), and MelaPettapalayam.

topPlaces.name: Peramandampalayam
topPlaces.description: Peramandampalayam is a large village located in Mohanur Taluka of Namakkal district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is one of the 27 villages of Mohanur Block of Namakkal district with total 718 families residing.

topPlaces.name: Andapuram
topPlaces.description: Andapuram is a village on the banks of Uppar river, in the Namakkal district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Andapuram is a Gram Panchayat, falling in the Mohanur Revenue Block, Namakkal Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Manmangalam
topPlaces.description: Manmangalam is a Town and Taluk in Tamil Nadu, India, in the Manmangalam created on 12 February 2014 by chief minister Dr. J. Jayalalitha through a TV conference from Chennai headquarters taluk of Karur district.

topPlaces.name: Chinnapallinayanpalayam
topPlaces.description: Chinnapallinayanpalayam is a village in the Hosur taluk of Krishnagiri district, Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Navaladi Karuppannaswami Temple – Mohanur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Navaladi Karuppannaswami Temple – Mohanur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Navaladi Karuppannaswami Temple – Mohanur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (69 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (66 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Navaladi Karuppannaswami Temple – Mohanur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Navaladi Karuppannaswami Temple – Mohanur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Navaladi Karuppannaswami Temple – Mohanur?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Navaladi Karuppannaswami Temple – Mohanur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Navaladi Karuppannaswami Temple – Mohanur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Asaladeebesvarar Temple, Mohanur, Mohanur, Manappalli, Peramandampalayam, Andapuram.
